info.title: Aspose.TeX Convert Micro Application for .NET
info.description: Aspose.TeX Convert Micro Application allows you to convert your TeX and LaTeX documents via the command line or add a TeX convert feature to your .NET application.

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Converts the document via command line interface.

options.name: --input
options.description: The path to the input document.

options.name: --output
options.description: The path for the converted document.

options.name: --width
options.description: Specifies the width of the converted document (for image formats).

options.name: --height
options.description: Specifies the height of the converted document (for image formats).

options.name: --resolution
options.description: Specifies the resolution of the converted document (for image formats).

options.name: --license
options.description: Specifies the path to the Aspose.TeX .NET license file.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enables verbose output for detailed logging. [default: False]

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add reference to the MicroApps API to your project.

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the project for the addition of the reference to the MicroApps API.
